new_value: {"notes":"Starting Nostr-native request/response transport implementation next, using the new auth and envelope profile semantics.\nImplemented Nostr-native control RPC transport: added control bus subscribing to kind 38384 addressed to daemon pubkey, request parsing and callback execution, response publish on kind 38386 with correlation tags, in-memory idempotency cache, bounded response cache, request max-age enforcement, and dedicated control checkpoint (control_ingest) wiring in swarmstrd for restart-safe dedupe."}
